title: Stage 01 Requirements Gate
description: Stage 1 (Requirements) gate. Authored by the pm agent after writing pipeline/brief.md. See .devteam/rules/pipeline.md §Stage 1 for the full contract.

acceptance_criteria_count.description: Number of acceptance criteria in the brief. Stage 6 maps these 1:1 to passing tests; mismatch blocks the Stage 7 auto-fold.

out_of_scope_items.description: Things the brief explicitly excludes; reviewers and PM use this to push back on scope creep.

required_sections_complete.description: True when the brief contains every section the brief template requires for the chosen track. See docs/brief-template.md.
